theatres.title: The Odyssey
theatres.review: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.
theatres.fullReview: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters, and trials that stretch both his cunning and his humanity to the breaking point.
theatres.take: Reviewers were close to unanimous — this one landed.

theatres.title: Moana
theatres.review: Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable…
theatres.fullReview: Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people.
theatres.take: Critics are split — praise for the originality and themes, pushback on the music.

theatres.title: Jana Nayagan
theatres.review: A clash of ideologies. One stands for the people, the other feeds on control. Their paths collided once before.
theatres.fullReview: A clash of ideologies. One stands for the people, the other feeds on control. Their paths collided once before. Years later, a child’s silent fear ignites the past, drawing a former police officer into a battle far bigger than personal revenge.
theatres.hook: A remake of the Telugu film ‘Bhagavanth Kesari’.

theatres.title: Dhamaal 4
theatres.review: The Dhamaal boys are back for another treasure hunt, facing hilarious challenges in their quest for the Treasure of Life.
theatres.fullReview: The Dhamaal boys are back for another treasure hunt, facing hilarious challenges in their quest for the Treasure of Life.

similar.title: You Will Meet a Tall Dark Stranger

theatres.title: Oru Vadakkan Velicham - A Northern Light
theatres.review: When a young man is taken in for questioning about the disappearance of a woman, a seemingly routine interrogation slowly unravels into something far more…
theatres.fullReview: When a young man is taken in for questioning about the disappearance of a woman, a seemingly routine interrogation slowly unravels into something far more personal. As hidden relationships, buried secrets, and long-suppressed truths begin to surface, the lines between justice, guilt, and revenge become increasingly blurred. Set against the backdrop of Canada, Oru Vadakkan Velicham is a Malayalam investigative thriller that explores deception, trauma, and the consequences of the past.

theatres.title: Evil Dead Burn
theatres.review: After her husband's abrupt death, Alice seeks solace with his remaining family — descendants of a leading researcher on demonic possession.
theatres.fullReview: After her husband's abrupt death, Alice seeks solace with his remaining family — descendants of a leading researcher on demonic possession. As her in-laws transform one by one into creatures that feed on fear, she comes to discover that the vows she took in life survive even in death.
theatres.take: Critics are split, though the writing found admirers.

ott.title: Nagabandham: The Secret Treasure
ott.review: A chosen warrior protects a mystical, serpent-bound Himalayan temple from those seeking to steal the power of the Brahma Kamalam, a divine relic.

similar.title: The Witcher: Nightmare of the Wolf

ott.fullReview: A chosen warrior protects a mystical, serpent-bound Himalayan temple from those seeking to steal the power of the Brahma Kamalam, a divine relic.

ott.title: Masters of the Universe
ott.review: After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam back to Eternia, where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of…
ott.fullReview: After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam back to Eternia, where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of Skeletor. To save his family and his world, Adam must join forces with his closest allies, Teela and Duncan/Man-At-Arms, and embrace his true destiny as He-Man — the most powerful man in the universe.
ott.take: Critics are split, though the performances and first half found admirers.

ott.title: Lingam
ott.review: Framed for a crime he didn't commit, a kabaddi hero gets pushed into a world he never wanted and ultimately becomes a feared name.
ott.fullReview: Framed for a crime he didn't commit, a kabaddi hero gets pushed into a world he never wanted and ultimately becomes a feared name.

ott.title: Star Trek: Strange New Worlds
ott.review: Follow Captain Christopher Pike, Science Officer Spock and Number One in the years before Captain Kirk boarded the U.S.S.
ott.fullReview: Follow Captain Christopher Pike, Science Officer Spock and Number One in the years before Captain Kirk boarded the U.S.S. Enterprise, as they explore new worlds around the galaxy.
ott.take: Critics liked it: the performances and production design won praise, though the tone drew some flak.

ott.title: Descendants: Wicked Wonderland
ott.review: Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a…

similar.title: Cinderella III: A Twist in Time

ott.fullReview: Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a new villain — Maddox Hatter. When Maddox captures the Queen of Hearts, Red and Chloe must work alongside Red’s new sister Pink, Luisa Madrigal’s son Luis, and Maddox’s son Max to save her and Wonderland.
ott.take: Reviewers singled out the performances for praise.

ott.title: House of the Dragon
ott.review: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.
ott.fullReview: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights. In the case of the Targaryens, their slow fall begins when King Viserys breaks with a century of tradition by naming his daughter Rhaenyra heir to the Iron Throne. But when Viserys later fathers a son, the court is shocked when Rhaenyra retains her status as his heir, and seeds of division sow friction across the realm.
ott.take: Reviewers found plenty to like here.

ott.title: Silo
ott.review: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…
ott.fullReview: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously, engineer Juliette starts to uncover shocking secrets and the truth about the silo.
ott.take: Critics liked it, especially the performances and production design.

ott.title: Super Subbu
ott.review: An unlucky teacher is assigned to teach sex ed in a hostile village. Can he balance this secret while chasing his dreams and saving his relationship?
ott.fullReview: An unlucky teacher is assigned to teach sex ed in a hostile village. Can he balance this secret while chasing his dreams and saving his relationship?

ott.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation
ott.review: When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

similar.title: The Aristocrat's Otherworldly Adventure: Serving Gods Who Go Too Far
I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability
KamiKatsu: Working for God in a Godless World

ott.fullReview: When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every opportunity to live the life he's always wanted. Armed with new friends, some freshly acquired magical abilities, and the courage to do the things he's always dreamed of, he's embarking on an epic adventure—with all of his past experience intact!

ott.title: Alliance
ott.review: A competitive captive reality show blending high-stakes strategy, economy and psychological warfare.
ott.fullReview: A competitive captive reality show blending high-stakes strategy, economy and psychological warfare. Sixteen celebrities are split into four teams, battling through physical and mental challenges to earn points-the only currency inside a mysterious HQ run by the System. Face the Ace's power, survive weekly votes, and rebuild alliances every reset.

comingSoon.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
comingSoon.review: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends…
comingSoon.fullReview: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter Parker he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.

comingSoon.title: The End of Oak Street
comingSoon.review: After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown,…
comingSoon.fullReview: After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

comingSoon.title: Batwara 1947
comingSoon.review: The story of an elderly Muslim woman who refuses to leave her ancestral home in Lahore, only to have a Hindu refugee…
comingSoon.fullReview: The story of an elderly Muslim woman who refuses to leave her ancestral home in Lahore, only to have a Hindu refugee family from Lucknow allotted to her house following the events of the 1947 Partition of India and Pakistan.

comingSoon.title: Maatrubhumi
comingSoon.review: Based on the events that took place between the Indian and Chinese troops at the Galwan region on June 15, 2020 when…
comingSoon.fullReview: Based on the events that took place between the Indian and Chinese troops at the Galwan region on June 15, 2020 when 200 Indian soldiers bravely defended their territory against a force of 1200 Chinese Liberation Army soldiers

comingSoon.title: Other Mommy
comingSoon.review: A young girl, Bela, forms a relationship with a sinister entity in her home who looks uncannily like her own mother.
comingSoon.fullReview: A young girl, Bela, forms a relationship with a sinister entity in her home who looks uncannily like her own mother.

comingSoon.title: Clayface
comingSoon.review: Follow the terrifying descent into hell of a promising Hollywood actor who has become a monster driven by revenge,…
comingSoon.fullReview: Follow the terrifying descent into hell of a promising Hollywood actor who has become a monster driven by revenge, exploring the loss of identity and humanity, the ravages of toxic love and the dark side of scientific ambition.
